results.rendered_html: ātmane—pada n. ‘word to one's self’, form for one's self i.e. that form of the verb which implies an action belonging or reverting to self, the terminations of the middle voice,  Pāṇ. i, 4, 100  and 3, 12 .

results.rendered_html:
ātmanepada (ātmane, dat. von ātman, + pada) n. die auf das Selbst, das Subject, zurückgehende Wortform; so heissen die Endungen des Mediums im Verbum  P. 1,4,100 . 3,12 . Ueber die Bildung des Wortes s.  P. 6,3,7 .
— Vgl. parasmaipada.
